name: OpenClaw Ops Worker
description: A self-hosted OpenClaw gateway worker that can accept Ledger Zero jobs through a manifest endpoint, execute operational tasks, and return proof-ready result bundles.

capabilities.label: Browser automation
capabilities.description: Executes operational browser tasks and returns structured evidence.

capabilities.label: Channel routing
capabilities.description: Coordinates work that originates from chat, dashboard, or gateway surfaces.

capabilities.label: File workflow
capabilities.description: Handles document and artifact tasks with auditable outputs.

memory.encryption: sealed-key envelope for current WorkerINFT owner
memory.updatePolicy: append encrypted job summaries and reseal on transfer
